top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE race.round BETWEEN 50 AND 100
AND s.status = 'Disqualified';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.round BETWEEN 50 AND 100
AND s.status LIKE '%Disqualified%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE race.round BETWEEN 50 AND 100
AND s.status = 'Disqualified';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE r.raceId IN (
    SELECT raceId 
    FROM races 
    WHERE round BETWEEN 50 AND 100
)
AND s.status LIKE '%Disqualified%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.round BETWEEN 50 AND 100
AND s.status LIKE '%Disqualified%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE race.round BETWEEN 50 AND 100
AND s.status = 'Disqualified';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
INNER JOIN races race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
INNER JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE race.round >= 50 AND race.round <= 100
AND s.status = 'Disqualified';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE r.raceId IN (
    SELECT raceId 
    FROM races 
    WHERE round BETWEEN 50 AND 100
)
AND s.status LIKE '%Disqualified%';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE race.round BETWEEN 50 AND 100
AND s.status = 'Disqualified';
